ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in weeks */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the training program (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who created the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mistakes" (
  "mistake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mistake */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mistake (e.g., Poor grip, Incorrect stance) */,
  "impact_on_game" TEXT /* Impact of the mistake on the game (e.g., Inconsistency, Unstable swing) */,
  "common_cause" TEXT /* Common cause of the mistake (e.g., Poor instruction, Lack of practice) */,
  "correction_tip" TEXT /* Tip for correcting the mistake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mistake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "improvement_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each improvement strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy (e.g., Learn proper grip, Develop tempo) */,
  "practice_tip" TEXT /* Practice tip to implement the strategy (e.g., Practice grip daily, Count swing rhythm) */,
  "drill" TEXT /* Drill to practice the strategy */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of implementing the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_mistakes" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "mistake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mistake associated with the program */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the mistake (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "mistake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_strategies" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the improvement strategy associated with the program */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the strategy (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the instructor */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Current handicap of the student */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Golfing goals (e.g., improve swing, reduce handicap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_programs" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program assigned to the student */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the program was assigned to the student */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the program was completed by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practice_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who logged the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the practice session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the practice session in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the practice session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the practice session (e.g., driving range, course) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practice_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_mistakes" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practice session */,
  "mistake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mistake worked on during the session */,
  "improvement" TEXT /* Notes on improvement (e.g., better grip, more consistent tempo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "mistake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress report */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the report is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the progress report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the student's progress */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the student's progress (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_reports_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_mistakes" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the progress report */,
  "mistake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mistake noted in the report */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Action plan to correct the mistake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "mistake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_students" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student assigned to the instructor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the student was assigned to the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id", "student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who set the goal */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Description of the goal (e.g., improve swing, reduce handicap) */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_goals_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on progress towards the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id", "progress_date")
)
